stories.title: MCP handler with expanded input schema

acceptanceCriteria.description: coordinateInputSchema includes all required and optional fields per REQ-14
acceptanceCriteria.command: node -e "const schema = require('./server/tools/coordinate.js').coordinateInputSchema; const keys = Object.keys(schema.shape || schema._def.shape()); const required = ['planPath', 'phaseId']; const optional = ['masterPlanPath', 'coordinateMode', 'budgetUsd', 'maxTimeMs', 'startTimeMs', 'currentPlanStartTimeMs', 'projectPath', 'prdContent', 'replanningNotes', 'haltClearedByHuman']; const hasAll = required.every(k => keys.includes(k)) && optional.every(k => keys.includes(k)); process.exit(hasAll ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Schema rejects malformed inputs with structured MCP error response
acceptanceCriteria.command: node -e "const {handleCoordinate} = require('./server/tools/coordinate.js'); handleCoordinate({planPath: 123, phaseId: 'PH-01'}).then(r => process.exit(r.isError ? 0 : 1)).catch(() => process.exit(0))"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Non-existent planPath returns structured error response
acceptanceCriteria.command: node -e "const {handleCoordinate} = require('./server/tools/coordinate.js'); handleCoordinate({planPath: '/nonexistent/plan.json', phaseId: 'PH-01'}).then(r => process.exit(r.isError ? 0 : 1)).catch(() => process.exit(0))"

acceptanceCriteria.description: handleCoordinate wires input to assessPhase and returns serialized PhaseTransitionBrief
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const {handleCoordinate} = require('./dist/server/tools/coordinate.js'); const plan = {schemaVersion: '3.0.0', stories: [{id: 'US-01', title: 'Test', dependencies: [], acceptanceCriteria: [], affectedPaths: []}], phases: [{id: 'PH-01', title: 'Test Phase', stories: ['US-01']}]}; require('fs').writeFileSync('./test-plan.json', JSON.stringify(plan)); handleCoordinate({planPath: './test-plan.json', phaseId: 'PH-01'}).then(r => process.exit(r.content && r.content[0].text.includes('phaseId') ? 0 : 1))"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Tool is registered in server/index.ts with description reflecting 4th forge primitive role
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -n 'forge_coordinate.*fourth.*primitive\|coordinate.*dispatch.*brief' server/index.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: Schema intentionally omits maxRetries field per REQ-14 v1.1
acceptanceCriteria.command: node -e "const schema = require('./server/tools/coordinate.js').coordinateInputSchema; const keys = Object.keys(schema.shape || schema._def.shape()); process.exit(keys.includes('maxRetries') ? 1 : 0)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: loadCoordinateConfig reads .forge/coordinate.config.json with single fs.readFile call
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const {loadCoordinateConfig} = require('./dist/server/lib/coordinator.js'); require('fs').mkdirSync('.forge', {recursive: true}); require('fs').writeFileSync('.forge/coordinate.config.json', '{}'); const config = loadCoordinateConfig('.'); process.exit(config ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Missing config file returns empty config without error
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const {loadCoordinateConfig} = require('./dist/server/lib/coordinator.js'); require('fs').rmSync('.forge/coordinate.config.json', {force: true}); const config = loadCoordinateConfig('.'); process.exit(Object.keys(config).length === 0 ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Schema has exactly four optional fields with correct defaults
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const {loadCoordinateConfig} = require('./dist/server/lib/coordinator.js'); const config = loadCoordinateConfig('.'); const expected = {storyOrdering: 'topological', phaseBoundaryBehavior: 'auto-advance', briefVerbosity: 'concise', observability: {}}; const matches = config.storyOrdering === expected.storyOrdering && config.phaseBoundaryBehavior === expected.phaseBoundaryBehavior && config.briefVerbosity === expected.briefVerbosity; process.exit(matches ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Zod schema uses .strict() and rejects unknown top-level fields with P45 warning
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('.forge', {recursive: true}); require('fs').writeFileSync('.forge/coordinate.config.json', JSON.stringify({budgetUsd: 100, unknownField: true})); const {loadCoordinateConfig} = require('./dist/server/lib/coordinator.js'); loadCoordinateConfig('.'); process.exit(0)" 2>&1 | grep -q 'budgetUsd'

acceptanceCriteria.description: writeRunRecord:false config emits P45 warning and brief recommendation prefix
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('.forge', {recursive: true}); require('fs').writeFileSync('.forge/coordinate.config.json', JSON.stringify({observability: {writeRunRecord: false}})); const {loadCoordinateConfig} = require('./dist/server/lib/coordinator.js'); loadCoordinateConfig('.'); process.exit(0)" 2>&1 | grep -q 'WARNING.*crash recovery disabled'

acceptanceCriteria.description: MCP input args override config file fields with configSource provenance
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('.forge', {recursive: true}); require('fs').writeFileSync('.forge/coordinate.config.json', JSON.stringify({briefVerbosity: 'detailed'})); const {handleCoordinate} = require('./dist/server/tools/coordinate.js'); const plan = {schemaVersion: '3.0.0', stories: [], phases: [{id: 'PH-01', title: 'Test', stories: []}]}; require('fs').writeFileSync('./test-plan.json', JSON.stringify(plan)); handleCoordinate({planPath: './test-plan.json', phaseId: 'PH-01', briefVerbosity: 'concise'}).then(r => { const brief = JSON.parse(r.content[0].text); process.exit(brief.configSource.briefVerbosity === 'args' ? 0 : 1); })"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Advisory mode uses brief.status as complete checkpoint signal with no separate checkpointRequired field
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const {handleCoordinate} = require('./dist/server/tools/coordinate.js'); const plan = {schemaVersion: '3.0.0', stories: [], phases: [{id: 'PH-01', title: 'Test', stories: []}]}; require('fs').writeFileSync('./test-plan.json', JSON.stringify(plan)); handleCoordinate({planPath: './test-plan.json', phaseId: 'PH-01', coordinateMode: 'advisory'}).then(r => { const brief = JSON.parse(r.content[0].text); process.exit(brief.hasOwnProperty('checkpointRequired') ? 1 : 0); })"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Brief status field contains valid values per REQ-05 4-case resolution rule
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const {handleCoordinate} = require('./dist/server/tools/coordinate.js'); const plan = {schemaVersion: '3.0.0', stories: [], phases: [{id: 'PH-01', title: 'Test', stories: []}]}; require('fs').writeFileSync('./test-plan.json', JSON.stringify(plan)); handleCoordinate({planPath: './test-plan.json', phaseId: 'PH-01'}).then(r => { const brief = JSON.parse(r.content[0].text); const valid = ['in-progress', 'complete', 'needs-replan', 'halted'].includes(brief.status); process.exit(valid ? 0 : 1); })"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Resuming from checkpoint via re-invocation with same inputs produces identical brief
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const {handleCoordinate} = require('./dist/server/tools/coordinate.js'); const plan = {schemaVersion: '3.0.0', stories: [{id: 'US-01', title: 'Test', dependencies: [], acceptanceCriteria: [], affectedPaths: []}], phases: [{id: 'PH-01', title: 'Test', stories: ['US-01']}]}; require('fs').writeFileSync('./test-plan.json', JSON.stringify(plan)); const input = {planPath: './test-plan.json', phaseId: 'PH-01'}; Promise.all([handleCoordinate(input), handleCoordinate(input)]).then(([r1, r2]) => { const brief1 = JSON.parse(r1.content[0].text); const brief2 = JSON.parse(r2.content[0].text); delete brief1.timestamp; delete brief2.timestamp; process.exit(JSON.stringify(brief1) === JSON.stringify(brief2) ? 0 : 1); })"

stories.title: Integration test suite covering end-to-end workflows

acceptanceCriteria.description: Multi-story dispatch integration test with dependency ordering
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm test -- --testNamePattern="multi-story dispatch.*dependency.*order"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Budget enforcement integration test with exceeded threshold
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm test -- --testNamePattern="budget.*exceed.*advisory"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Halt-hard 3-step clearing state machine integration test
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm test -- --testNamePattern="halt.hard.*clear.*state.machine"

acceptanceCriteria.description: ConfigSource end-to-end provenance test with file-args-default chain
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm test -- --testNamePattern="configSource.*provenance.*file.*args.*default"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Plan mutation reconciliation integration test with failed-story rename
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm test -- --testNamePattern="plan.mutation.*reconcil.*failed.*rename"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Ready-for-retry integration test with priorEvalReport feed
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm test -- --testNamePattern="ready.for.retry.*priorEvalReport"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Dep-failed transitive propagation integration test with chain classification
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm test -- --testNamePattern="dep.failed.*transitive.*propagation.*chain"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Mixed failed+ready phase escalates to needs-replan integration test
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm test -- --testNamePattern="mixed.*failed.*ready.*needs.replan"

stories.title: Dogfood run with multi-story execution plan

acceptanceCriteria.description: Dogfood run executes against valid multi-story execution plan without crashes
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const {handleCoordinate} = require('./dist/server/tools/coordinate.js'); const plan = {schemaVersion: '3.0.0', stories: [{id: 'US-01', title: 'First', dependencies: [], acceptanceCriteria: [{id: 'AC-01', description: 'Test', command: 'echo test'}], affectedPaths: []}, {id: 'US-02', title: 'Second', dependencies: ['US-01'], acceptanceCriteria: [{id: 'AC-01', description: 'Test', command: 'echo test'}], affectedPaths: []}], phases: [{id: 'PH-01', title: 'Test Phase', stories: ['US-01', 'US-02']}]}; require('fs').writeFileSync('./dogfood-plan.json', JSON.stringify(plan)); handleCoordinate({planPath: './dogfood-plan.json', phaseId: 'PH-01'}).then(r => process.exit(r.isError ? 1 : 0))"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Brief shows correct topological ordering with US-01 before US-02
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const {handleCoordinate} = require('./dist/server/tools/coordinate.js'); const plan = {schemaVersion: '3.0.0', stories: [{id: 'US-02', title: 'Second', dependencies: ['US-01'], acceptanceCriteria: [], affectedPaths: []}, {id: 'US-01', title: 'First', dependencies: [], acceptanceCriteria: [], affectedPaths: []}], phases: [{id: 'PH-01', title: 'Test Phase', stories: ['US-02', 'US-01']}]}; require('fs').writeFileSync('./dogfood-plan.json', JSON.stringify(plan)); handleCoordinate({planPath: './dogfood-plan.json', phaseId: 'PH-01'}).then(r => { const brief = JSON.parse(r.content[0].text); const us01Index = brief.stories.findIndex(s => s.storyId === 'US-01'); const us02Index = brief.stories.findIndex(s => s.storyId === 'US-02'); process.exit(us01Index < us02Index ? 0 : 1); })"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Dogfood report checked in under .ai-workspace/plans/
acceptanceCriteria.command: test -f .ai-workspace/plans/forge-coordinate-dogfood-report.md

stories.title: Spec-vs-types vocabulary drift check for forge_evaluate coherence mode

acceptanceCriteria.description: verifySpecVocabulary helper parses TypeScript interfaces under server/types/
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const {verifySpecVocabulary} = require('./dist/server/lib/spec-vocabulary-check.js'); const result = verifySpecVocabulary('server/types/', 'docs/forge-coordinate-prd.md'); process.exit(Array.isArray(result) ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Helper scans PRD for backtick-quoted TypeName.fieldName references
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const {verifySpecVocabulary} = require('./dist/server/lib/spec-vocabulary-check.js'); const fs = require('fs'); fs.writeFileSync('./test-prd.md', 'Test \`EvalReport.criteria\` reference'); const result = verifySpecVocabulary('server/types/', './test-prd.md'); process.exit(result.some(r => r.includes('EvalReport.criteria')) ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Helper emits coherence findings for orphan field references not found in types
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const {verifySpecVocabulary} = require('./dist/server/lib/spec-vocabulary-check.js'); const fs = require('fs'); fs.writeFileSync('./test-prd.md', 'Test \`FakeType.orphanField\` reference'); const result = verifySpecVocabulary('server/types/', './test-prd.md'); process.exit(result.some(r => r.includes('orphan') || r.includes('FakeType.orphanField')) ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Real PRD regression check against current server/types/ finds no orphan references
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const {verifySpecVocabulary} = require('./dist/server/lib/spec-vocabulary-check.js'); const result = verifySpecVocabulary('server/types/', 'docs/forge-coordinate-prd.md'); const orphans = result.filter(r => r.includes('orphan')); process.exit(orphans.length === 0 ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: forge_evaluate coherence mode integrates spec-vocabulary check as new coherence finding
acceptanceCriteria.command: npm run build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const evaluateJs = fs.readFileSync('dist/server/tools/evaluate.js', 'utf8'); process.exit(evaluateJs.includes('verifySpecVocabulary') || evaluateJs.includes('spec-vocabulary-check') ? 0 : 1)"
